content.en:
"A carousel-level primordial artifact has been erased from its will, leaving only its body, which should be done by a carousel-level powerhouse of the Boulder Tribe!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Subsequently, along with the other Sevenfold Ancestors, he was sent into the void inside the divine tree, and saw a white liquid substance.

"This is the Void White Holy Liquid, you can next cultivate here for ten million Origin Realm Eras. The Void White Liquid can raise your life level, and it also has the effect of boosting your will. "

The Ninefold Ancestor of the Nine-Story Building reminded.

Ye Tian and the other Dao Ancestors nodded, indicating that they knew.

Subsequently, the Ninefold Origin Ancestor left, leaving only Ye Tian and the Sevenfold Origin Ancestor here to absorb the Void White Holy Liquid.

Similarly, there is also a transformation-level powerhouse of the Boulder tribe guarding here.

Under the supervision of this transformation-level powerhouse, the Sevenfold Ancestors could only honestly refine the Void White Holy Liquid to improve their life level and will, but they didn't want to take the Void White Holy Liquid, otherwise they would definitely be discovered.

......

"Void White Holy Liquid, the effect should be good!"

Ye Tian sat cross-legged in the Void White Holy Liquid and began to absorb the energy of the Void White Holy Liquid.

Rumble!!!

The pure and gentle energy nourished Ye Tian's body and will, making Ye Tian's life level rise rapidly, but his will was also improving.

It's just that the main function of the Void White Holy Liquid is to improve the level of life, and the will is only incidentally improved.

In the next ten million years of the Origin Domain Era, Ye Tian had been absorbing the Void White Holy Liquid with all his might.

As before, Ye Tian's speed of absorbing the Void White Holy Liquid was also very terrifying, which made the Giant Stone Tribe's avatar-level powerhouse a little reluctant.

"This little guy in the Nine Stories Building is absorbing the Void White Holy Liquid too fast, this time it's a big loss, I'm afraid it will take a long time to make up for these Void White Holy Liquids!"

This avatar-level powerhouse said secretly.

Before you know it, ten million years of the Primordial Era have passed.

Ye Tian and the others also came out of the void inside this divine tree, and they were not allowed to continue refining the Void White Holy Liquid.

Ye Tian also wanted to get a few more opportunities in the Boulder Tribe, but the Ninefold Ancestor of the Nine-Fold Building directly brought Ye Tian and them out.

Obviously, this opportunity is over.

Of course, Ye Tian was also satisfied.

After all, he entered the Boulder Ancient Nest this time, and his strength has improved too much.

At present, his cultivation has been promoted to the late stage of the Sevenfold Origin Ancestor, and he is only one step away from the peak of the Sevenfold Origin Ancestor, and his life level has skyrocketed.

What a terrifying ascension!

......

Ancient Spring Xuanlou.

Ye Tian returned here, and then began to test his life level.

He knew that his life level had skyrocketed a lot, but he didn't know exactly how much.

Soon, the test results came in.

【21.5】

"My life level has reached more than 21!!!"

Ye Tian was surprised.

According to his previous plan, he felt that his cultivation had reached the peak realm of the Sevenfold Primordial Ancestor, and his life level was hopefully above 20.

After all, in the Nine-Fold Building, it is too rare for the Sevenfold Primordial Ancestor to break through the life level of more than 20, and some of them are all Sevenfold Primordial Ancestors who are stranded in this realm and try their best to improve their life level, wanting to break through with a more powerful foundation, which causes the life level to break through to more than 20.

But now, Ye Tian's cultivation is still in the late stage of the Sevenfold Ancestor, and his life level has broken through to more than 21, which is an unimaginable improvement!

"Those two treasure lands of the Boulder Tribe are so good, if I keep cultivating there, I hope to raise my life level to more than 25!"

Ye Tian firmly believed.

Of course, there must be a similar treasure in the nine-story building.

It's a pity that there are too many Dao Ancestors in the Nine-Story Building, and they can not withstand such consumption when they are used from generation to generation, so the use of those treasure lands is very strict, and many treasure lands are in a state of ban, and they will only be opened once in a long time, and it is impossible to open them all the time.

And even if it's turned on, it will require a huge amount of points to enter it.

This time it was to use the treasure land of the Giant Stone Tribe to cultivate, so the Nine-Story Building was so generous, and it didn't need any points and costs.

Deep in the nine-story building.

When the Absolute Sword Dao Ancestor knew Ye Tian's test results, he was immediately a little surprised.

"The life level is 21.5, the life level of the Endless Dao Ancestor has increased too fast, and the other Sevenfold Ancestors who entered the Boulder Ancient Nest with him have not improved so much!"

The Absolute Sword Dao Ancestor felt that it was too incredible at the moment, this simply broke his cognition!

At this rate, Ye Tian would definitely become an Eightfold Origin Ancestor very quickly, unlike other Dao Ancestors who would stay for a long time in the Sevenfold Origin Ancestor and the Half-Step Eightfold Origin Ancestor.

"With the growth speed of the Endless Dao Ancestor, there is hope that he can catch up with that thing, as long as he goes all out, the speed of becoming a half-step Eightfold Origin Ancestor at his life level will be very fast. Once he becomes a half-step Yae Ancestor, I can give him a spot!"

So, he immediately called Ye Tian over.

......

"Landlord!"

Ye Tian stood in front of the Absolute Sword Dao Ancestor and said respectfully.

Absolute Sword Dao Ancestor said: "Endless Dao Ancestor, I called you here this time because I have something to tell you. This time, the Nine-Story Building obtained the entrance to a secret place from the Boulder Tribe, which is located where the Silent Black Sea meets the Primordial Ancient River, where there are many opportunities. However, due to the danger and instability there, the Nine-Story Building would only send a half-step Yae Ancestor over. Originally, your cultivation was not qualified to pass, but now that you are growing rapidly, are you sure that you will be able to raise your cultivation to the half-step eightfold origin ancestor realm within 10 billion years of the original domain era. If you're sure, I'll give you a spot!"

"Yes!"

Ye Tian said without the slightest hesitation.

He is now very close to the peak realm of the Sevenfold Origin Ancestor, or hundreds of millions of Origin Realm Eras, he can definitely break through.

When the time comes, he will be able to impact the half-step eightfold origin ancestor realm, and with his Yuan Dao realm plus the life level, the speed of impacting the half-step eightfold origin ancestor realm will be very fast.

Therefore, within the 10 billion years of the Origin Domain Era, he has 100% hope of breaking through.

"Okay, then I'll reserve this quota for you, but if you can't break through, this quota will be given to someone else!" reminded the Absolute Sword Dao Ancestor.

"Yes, landlord!"

Ye Tianying said.

He then left and returned to his lodgings.

In the following years, Ye Tian exchanged the useful treasures on his body at all costs, and then exchanged them for the resources he needed.

Moreover, he spent almost all the points of the Nine-Story Building, and entered a treasure land that could improve his cultivation.

He wanted to raise his cultivation to the peak realm of the Sevenfold Origin Ancestor as quickly as possible.

Finally, after the 600 million years of the Origin Domain Era, Xiuwei officially broke through to the peak realm of the Sevenfold Origin Ancestor.

"When I just broke through to the peak of the Sevenfold Primordial Ancestor, I didn't expect to break through so quickly, it's countless times faster!

Ye Tian said excitedly.

Now, his cultivation has reached the peak realm of the Sevenfold Primordial Ancestor, which is already the ultimate of the Sevenfold Primordial Ancestor, and if he wants to make further progress, he can only impact the half-step Eightfold Primordial Ancestor realm!

And for other Origin Ancestors, it was undoubtedly unimaginably difficult to become a half-step Eightfold Origin Ancestor, but it was easy for him.
